description:
Tiny home Sleeps 4 Comfortably

→ 1 King Bed - Sleeps 2 (living area) 
→ 1 Queen Inflatable Bed - Sleeps 2 (living area)

Please note that this is a TINY HOME! It has minimal space. Please check photos for reference.

You get an entire home with a sauna, jacuzzi, firepit, mini golf, and private pool.

I'm available to assist you throughout your stay, but the level of interaction is entirely up to you. Feel free to message me anytime! You'll also be able to self check-in upon your arrival.

This neighborhood provides a tranquil desert escape with breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains and open skies. Situated near Joshua Tree National Park, the area is known for its unique blend of rugged natural beauty and artistic charm. You'll find a mix of quiet residential streets, eclectic shops, and local eateries just a short drive away. It's an ideal spot for those seeking tranquility, outdoor adventures, and a connection to the vibrant desert culture of the high desert.

For your safety and that of our neighbors, the exterior of the home is monitored 24/7 by security.

Since you’re in the desert, expect some critters, dirt, dust, and bugs. The pool can attract various wildlife, and while we clean it weekly, occasional visitors may still drop by.

The pool has a $350 fee per day and requires at least 48 hours’ notice to ensure everything is functioning properly.

Please use the pool at your own risk; we are not responsible for any accidents or injuries. Never leave pets or children unattended near the pool.

name: JT Walpi - Red
public_name: Joshua Tree Oasis • Pickleball • Pool • Jacuzzi

address.display: 64793 Walpi Drive, Joshua Tree, CA, 92252, US

summary: Modern desert escape with private saltwater pool, jacuzzi, pickleball and bocce courts, luxurious loungers, indoor fireplace and stunning views, perfect for families and groups up to six.
description:
🏊‍♂️ POOL & HOT TUB

- Saltwater heated pool and jacuzzi provide a refreshing retreat.

- Queen‑size day bed loungers surround the water for ultimate comfort.

🎾 PICKLEBALL & BOCCE

- Private pickleball court and bocce ball court invite friendly competition.

- Spacious outdoor area perfect for active play.

🌅 SUNSET & FIRE PIT

- Outdoor fire pit creates a memorable evening setting.

- Alfresco dining table and BBQ grill for outdoor meals.

- Hammocks and lounge chairs let you soak in spectacular sunsets.

🛏️ SLEEPING

- Two king bedrooms and a queen inflatable bed comfortably sleep six.

- Plush linens and extra pillows ensure a restful stay.

🔑 GUEST ACCESS

- Entire home is yours with private entrance and self‑check‑in via smart lock.

- Free on‑site parking and EV charger for electric vehicles.

- Air‑conditioned living space equipped with TV, Wi‑Fi, Sonos speakers and high‑speed Ethernet.

- Fully fenced backyard guarantees privacy.

- Pets are welcome for a family‑friendly stay.

Two days before your arrival, you will receive instructions on where to park, how to locate the home and how to access it.

I am here for you during your stay, but our level of interaction is up to you. I'm only a message away. You will be able to self check-in when you arrive.

Welcome to your serene desert escape nestled within the rugged beauty of the Mojave Desert. Known for its breathtaking views of the iconic Joshua trees and rocky landscapes, this quiet location offers easy access to both the natural wonders of Joshua Tree National Park and the eclectic charm of the nearby Joshua Tree village.
Local Attractions:

Joshua Tree National Park – Famous for its stunning rock formations and desert landscapes.
Keys View – A scenic overlook offering panoramic views of the Coachella Valley and San Andreas Fault.
Pioneertown – A quirky Old West-style town originally built as a movie set.
The Integratron – A unique structure offering sound baths and mystical experiences.
Noah Purifoy Outdoor Desert Art Museum – An open-air museum showcasing large-scale, desert-inspired art installations.

A car is essential — Joshua Tree is a rural desert community with no public transit. The park entrance is minutes away, and most errands require driving. Palm Springs International Airport (PSP) is approximately 40 minutes south. LAX is roughly 2.5 hours west. Ride-share has limited availability in Joshua Tree; a rental car is strongly recommended. Gas up and stock supplies before heading out — the desert is remote.

⚠️ HOUSE RULES & NOTES

- Treat the property with respect; neighbors share the quiet desert community.

- Security cameras monitor the exterior 24/7 for safety.

- Pool is cleaned twice weekly; use at your own risk and never leave children or pets unattended.

- Registration code: CESTRP‑2024‑00447.

- Desert environment includes natural wildlife; enjoy the authentic Joshua Tree experience.

-POOL Heating Fee of 350$ per day and we require a 48 hour notice to ensure pool gets hot. (jacuzzi is free to heat)

description:
*** Sleeps 6 Comfortably ***

→ 1 King Bed - Sleeps 2 - Bedroom
→ 1 King Bed - Sleeps 2 - Bedroom
→ 1 Queen Inflatable Bed - Sleeps 2 (Living area bed)
Sleeps 8 if you want to use the dome bed

You get an entire home with all the amenities.

Two days before your arrival, you will receive instructions on where to park, how to locate the home and how to access it.

I am here for you during your stay, but our level of interaction is up to you. I'm only a message away. You will be able to self check-in when you arrive.

In the high desert community of Joshua Tree — one of California's most distinctive and creatively charged small towns, sitting at the entrance to Joshua Tree National Park — the park itself is a world-renowned landscape of twisted Joshua trees, dramatic boulder formations, and dark skies perfect for stargazing. The town has quietly become an arts mecca: galleries, funky vintage shops, and excellent restaurants line the main corridor. Don't miss Pappy & Harriet's Pioneertown Palace (~10 min) for live music and BBQ in a genuine Old West movie set town. Palm Springs is about 40 minutes south for additional dining, mid-century architecture, and resort spas.

A car is essential — Joshua Tree is a rural desert community with no public transit. The park entrance is minutes away, and most errands require driving. Palm Springs International Airport (PSP) is approximately 40 minutes south. LAX is roughly 2.5 hours west. Ride-share has limited availability in Joshua Tree; a rental car is strongly recommended. Gas up and stock supplies before heading out — the desert is remote.

Please remember that you will be staying in a home, not a hotel. We do have neighbors therefore, we ask that you treat our space with the same respect you would show your own. If any problems arise, we will do our best to take action ASAP, but there is no one living on site. 

For the safety and security of our guests and neighbors, the exterior of this home is monitored 24/7 by Home Security

Please remember that you are staying in the desert, there will be critters, dirt, dust, and bugs.

The pool has a $350 fee per day and requires at least 48 hours’ notice to ensure everything is functioning properly.

The pool attracts all sorts of critters and from time to time, they do fall in the pool. Please rest assured, we clean it 2 times a week.

Use the pool at your own risk, we are not responsible for any accidents or injuries.

NEVER leave pets or children unattended around the pool.

We have two homes on this lot, they can be rented together for large parties. Message us for info.
